sidebar.title:
Tech-Spec
Sparring Agent
sidebar.tagline: Spars on architecture decisions, flags compliance and security risks, maps dependencies. Keeps the architect in the loop throughout.

principle.label: ⚡ Key Principle — HITL-first
principle.text: No architecture decision closes without human sign-off. No ADR is generated without HITL validation.

card.title: Multi-modal Sparring Interface
card.note: Architect or tech lead engages directly — session-aware, multi-turn dialogue

components.name: Architectural Sparring
components.note: Suggest solution options aligned with enterprise architecture patterns

components.name: Compliance & Security Check
components.note: Flag risks against AI Gov., IT Security and Data governance rules

components.name: Specification Refinement
components.note: Sharpen and structure technical specs from sparring output

components.name: Dependency Mapping
components.note: Build system dependency maps from codebase and integration docs

components.name: Complexity & Risk Assessment
components.note: Surface hidden complexity drivers — integration, data, cross-domain impact

cards.name: Session Memory
cards.desc: Conversation history · decisions made · open items

cards.name: Knowledge Graph
cards.desc: Dependencies · impact analysis paths · data flows · integration topology

rag.label: RAG / Retrieval Pipeline
rag.body: Vector store · semantic search over enterprise documentation, architecture guidelines, and codebase patterns

cards.name: Integration Catalog
cards.detail: Enterprise integration patterns and connector registry

cards.name: Document Repositories
cards.detail: Architecture docs · ADRs · technical specs · compliance docs

cards.name: ForBot
cards.detail: Internal knowledge base and process automation connector
